title: UPCATET 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: UPCATET 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: UPCATET 2026 Application Form last date extended to 15 May 2026 (05:00 PM). Check UPCATET 2026 exam dates (10-11 June), application fee, eligibility criteria, and step-by-step apply online process at upcatetexam.org.

content.text: UPCATET 2026 Application Form last date has been extended. Candidates can now apply online from 30 March 2026 to 15 May 2026 (05:00 PM) through the official website upcatetexam.org. The Uttar Pradesh Combined Agriculture and Technology Entrance Test (UPCATET) 2026 will be conducted on 10 and 11 June 2026 for admission to undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD programmes in agriculture and allied sciences offered by participating agricultural universities across Uttar Pradesh.

rows: Last Date for Online Fee Payment

content.text: Apply Online for UPCATET 2026: Visit Official Website → Apply Now

UPCATET stands for Uttar Pradesh Combined Agriculture and Technology Entrance Test. It is conducted by Banda University of Agriculture and Technology (BUAT) for admissions into various UG, PG, and PhD courses in Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Home Science, Veterinary Science, and other allied fields offered by state agricultural universities in Uttar Pradesh.

rows: Passed/appearing in 10+2 with PCB/PCM/Agriculture or relevant subjects (minimum 60% marks for most courses)
16–22 years (General); relaxation for reserved categories (up to 27 years)
Bachelor’s degree in relevant agriculture/allied field (minimum 60% marks)
17–25 years (General); relaxation up to 30 years for reserved

items: Recent passport-size photograph (JPG, 100-200 KB)
Scanned signature and left thumb impression (JPG, 50-100 KB)
Class 10 and 12 mark sheets/certificates
Category certificate and domicile proof (if applicable)
Aadhaar card or valid photo ID

sections.heading: How to Apply for UPCATET 2026 – Step-by-Step Process

items: Visit the official website: upcatetexam.org
Click on “New Registration” and fill basic details (name, date of birth, category, mobile number, email ID).
Verify your mobile/email with the OTP received.
Login using registration number and password.
Fill the detailed application form: personal information, educational qualifications, choice of programme, and exam city.
Upload scanned documents in the prescribed format and size.
Pay the application fee online.
Review all entered details carefully and submit the form.
Download and take a printout of the confirmation page for future reference.

content.text: Application Correction: Limited corrections can be made on 02 May 2026.

The exam is conducted in offline (pen-and-paper) mode. It consists of multiple-choice questions from relevant subjects depending on the chosen group (e.g., Agriculture, Biology, Mathematics for UG). There is usually one mark per correct answer with negative marking for wrong answers. Detailed pattern and syllabus will be available in the official notification/brochure on the website.
